case_title: TREYVON FIELDS ET AL VS. INTERDENT SERVICE CORPORATION, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-21-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT(S) SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NATALIE DAVIS-MILLER $3793.64. PARTIES MUST APPEAR AT THE JANUARY CALLING OF THIS CASE IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCE THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN (D506)
